Follow-up sequence from Lead Generation Magnet:
EMAIL #1:  Confirm Their Request
As soon as someone fills out and submits the form to get the shock-and-awe package sent to them, you want to let them know that you're taking immediate action.  So you'll need a "confirmation email" to go out automatically.
This email should accomplish the following:
Give them immediate feedback that their request has been successfully completed and registered.
Congratulate them on the wisdom of making the decision to request your Lead Gen Magnet.
Provide contact info (recommend using an email address) if they have any questions.
Reinforce and get them excited about what they'll be receiving.
Here's a template for Email #1.  You should be able to pull the copy for the benefits/etc. from the Lead Generation Postcard / Landing Page you've already created (see how easy this is!)

SUBJECT: Congratulations! Watch Your Mailbox for the Info Requested.
Dear [PROSPECT FIRSTNAME],
More than likely, you get hit on all sides from people wanting your attention, so I appreciate you taking the time to read this email.  
My purpose is simple:  I wanted to take a second to thank you for requesting [HOT LEAD GENERATION TITLE]:
In this valuable FREE Audio and Report you will discover exactly how you can experience [ULTIMATE TRANSFORMATION] and overcome [CHALLENGE 1], [CHALLENGE 2], and even [CHALLENGE 3].
It was a very smart move on your part to take action on getting this valuable information.
Your Report and CD are on their way to your door right now.  Watch your mailbox for that very important package - again, it contains your key to experiencing [ULTIMATE TRANSFORMATION].
If there's any kind of problem with it not arriving, or if you have any other questions, please feel free to contact us via email at you@email.com. 
Thank you again and watch for that package!
Sincerely, 
[YOUR NAME]
[YOUR ROLE]

Follow-up sequence from Lead Generation Magnet:
Email #2:   Make Sure They Examine the LeadGen Magnet and 
Present Your Offer
The second email in the series should be sent out AFTER you've mailed the package and you think it's arrived at their address - depending on how you ship / their location /etc. this could vary, so you'll have to figure that out on your own.  Optimally, this email should go out no more than a couple days after it's arrived.  
This email should accomplish the following:
Reinforce the need to go through the ENTIRE package if they haven't done so already.
Congratulate them again on being really smart for asking for the info.
Lay out the benefits / transformations that happen by reading it.
Introduce your primary OFFER for your product or service - as described in detail in your sales letter.
State the benefits /transformations associated with your product / service offer.
Push urgency to accept the offer - scarcity, time limit, whatever.  A 2-week deadline is good to start with. 
Call to Action on the offer (e.g., do this to buy now!)
NOTE: Follow Up Emails 2, 3, and 4 should be sent out to ONLY those who HAVEN'T yet taken you up on your offer.  Once someone buys, you take them out of the follow-up sequence. 

SUBJECT: You've Got the Info - Now Discover More About Solving [KEY PROBLEM]
Dear [PROSPECT FIRSTNAME],
I know something very important about you.
Because you took that step to request [HOT LEADGEN TITLE], I know that you're serious about taking steps to solve [CORE PROBLEM] - otherwise you'd have been just like so many other [TARGET PROSPECTS] who just sat on the sidelines and did nothing. You took action and not only requested this valuable information; you've already gone through it!  
(Now if you haven't YET gone through it, don't delay… it's super important!)
And, in [HOT LEADGEN TITLE], you discovered how to overcome [CHALLENGE 1], [CHALLENGE 2], and even [CHALLENGE 3].
However, you may be thinking that even though this is great, you're just too [OBJECTION - e.g., Busy, Tired, Overworked, Whatever] to take action on everything revealed. 

Follow-up sequence from Lead Generation Magnet:
EMAIL #3 - Re-State Your Offer / Stress Your Credibility
Email #3 should go out about 3-5 days after Email #2 - AND / OR about 3-5days before the deadline for the offer expires.   (Again, in terms of timing, you don't want an EXTENDED deadline period - 10 days to 2 weeks is just about right). 
This email should accomplish the following:
Confirm that by now they've consumed the LeadGen Magnet.
Describe why YOU can be trusted to deliver on your promises.
Stress there IS a deadline looming.
Restate the clear, massive value of your offer.
Again, look in your Sales letter for the source content to re-use and leverage here.

SUBJECT:  The Best Way to Overcome [CORE PROBLEM] 
Dear [PROSPECT FIRSTNAME],
So you've almost certainly gone through all the information in the [HOT LEADGEN TITLE] we recently sent you. My guess is that you probably feel like it's a great start - and would like to discover even MORE!
Well - I have some very good news - we're 100% focused on solving [CORE PROBLEM]... and we make that happen by offering you my [WIDGET/PRODUCT TITLE], which includes:
* [CORE FEATURE] and [ASSOCIATED BENEFIT] 
* [CORE FEATURE] and [ASSOCIATED BENEFIT] 
* [CORE FEATURE] and [ASSOCIATED BENEFIT] 
And much more.  How can you be sure this works?  Don't just take my word for it, here's what [SATISFIED CUSTOMER NAME] had to say:
[INSERT TESTIMONIAL DIRECTLY RELATED TO YOUR OFFER]
Imagine how much it would be worth to YOU to experience the same thing?  Well you can.  But you need to hurry…
Because in just [X DAYS] our incredible offer disappears - make sure now to [CALL TO ACTION DETAILS - WEBSITE, CALL, FAX, FILL OUT FORM, etc.]   
Sincerely,
[YOUR NAME]
[YOUR ROLE]
 
Follow-up sequence from Lead Generation Magnet:
Email #4 - Today's Your Last Chance
Email #4 goes out on the day the deadline expires.  This email should accomplish the following:
Restate your offer
State clearly: One Day Left!
Push the urgency to act NOW!

SUBJECT:  [FINAL NOTICE] Last Day, Offer Withdrawn 
Dear [PROSPECT FIRSTNAME],
By now you've gone through the [HOT LEADGEN TITLE] and all the information... so you know all about the incredible offer we're making on our [WIDGET/PRODUCT TITLE]. 
But did you know that TODAY is the LAST DAY it's available?
We very much take pride in our ability to provide you with top notch value and service - so much so that we back up our words with our [GUARANTEE].
I wanted to remind you one final time that you can still [SOLVE KEY PROBLEM] and experience [ULTIMATE TRANSFORMATION].  
Why not put a stop to the pain once and for all? 
So right now [CALL TO ACTION DETAILS -WEBSITE, CALL, FAX, FILL OUT FORM, etc.]  And start experiencing [ULTIMATE TRANSFORMATION] today!
Sincerely,
[YOUR NAME]
[YOUR ROLE]
